---
title: "Recursive Decomposition Stack"
---

# Recursive Decomposition Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://recursive-decomposition-stack/9E9D03E9C0`

**Enter:** Use when the task is too large for one spell or one session and scope can shrink recursively.


## Related Runes

- [0012 boundary](../reference/house-architecture-abstraction-and-design.qmd#rune-0012) - The line that says where one responsibility ends and another begins.
- [0055 interface {Arch}](../reference/house-architecture-abstraction-and-design.qmd#rune-0055) - A disciplined seam that lets unlike bodies cooperate without swapping internal organs.
- [1172 invariant](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1172) - A law that must remain true while the rest of the system is allowed to move. If you cannot say the invariant, you probably do not yet understand the change.
- [1437 composable](../reference/house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd#rune-1437) - A promise adjective; it binds the system to a stronger form of conduct.
- [1445 deterministic](../reference/house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd#rune-1445) - Given the same inputs, the same result should return. This is the antidote to drift, heisenbugs, and unreviewable behavior.


## Related Spell Templates and References

- [Api Design](../spells/api-design.qmd)
- [Safe Refactoring](../spells/safe-refactoring.qmd)
- [Test Generation](../spells/test-generation.qmd)
- [Stack Grammar](../reference/stack-grammar.qmd)
- [Failure Modes](../reference/failure-modes.qmd)
- [Canon Map](../reference/canon-map.qmd)
| Step | Spell               | Artifact                     | Advance when                                 |
| ---- | ------------------- | ---------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Define contract     | Parent contract              | Boundary and obligations are clear           |
| 2    | Split into children | Smaller scopes               | Every child is smaller than parent scope     |
| 3    | Call child stack    | Solved child scope           | Child base case or child verification passes |
| 4    | Integrate           | Integrated parent scope      | Children compose under parent contract       |
| 5    | System verify       | Parent verification evidence | Children are green and parent contract holds |

## Loop or Recursion

```json
{
  "recursive": true,
  "base_case": "Scope is small enough to understand, implement, and verify in one bounded pass"
}
```


## On Fail

Stop descent if child scopes do not shrink or contract consistency is lost.

## Why It Works

It lets one choreography operate at several scales while preserving contracts at every boundary.
